componentDescription:
Renders series mapPoint items at their projected coordinates.

With a size axis it behaves as a bubble map, scaling each marker from its `value`.
With `cluster` enabled, nearby points collapse into aggregated markers.

cluster.description: Collapses points that are close to each other on screen into a single marker showing the member count. Pass true for the default radius, or an object to tune it. Clustering is zoom-aware: zooming in spreads points apart and splits clusters.

fill.description: Fill color applied to every marker. Overrides item and series colors.

showLabels.description: If true, renders the label of each point next to its marker.

size.description: The base size of the markers, as the symbol area in square pixels. Used as the fallback when no size axis is set, turning the series into a bubble map.

stroke.description: Stroke color applied to every marker.

strokeWidth.description: Stroke width applied to every marker.
